body:
This pack can help you in both PvP and Survival.
This resource pack is designed to optimize gameplay and provide practical visual improvements for both PvP and survival players, all while staying close to Minecraft's default style. It includes a variety of helpful features such as:

🔢 Numbered Hotbar – Adds numbers to your hotbar slots for quicker and more accurate item switching.

📦 Mini Items – Shrinks held and item frame objects for better screen visibility.

🌊 Clear Water – Makes water more transparent for easier underwater exploration.

⛏ Ore Borders – Adds clear borders around ores to make them easier to spot while mining.

🧾 Transparent GUI – Semi-transparent inventory, chest, and crafting menus to keep your surroundings visible.

🪙 Mini Totem Pops – Smaller totem pop animation to reduce screen clutter during combat.

🔥 Low Fire – Fire visuals are lowered to improve visibility when on fire.

🛡 Low Shield – Shield is lowered when held to give you a clearer view of your screen.

And much more to discover!

Made By DarkMage211.

My YT: DarkMage211
